sections.content_assessed: Nesta sessao mostraste que tens uma boa base em portugues. O teu vocabulario cobre bem as situacoes do dia a dia. Os problemas principais surgiram no uso dos tempos verbais (preterito perfeito vs. imperfeito) e nas preposicoes de lugar.
sections.content_native: In this session, you demonstrated that you have a good foundation in Portuguese. Your vocabulary covers everyday situations well. The main problems appeared in the use of tenses (simple past vs. imperfect) and in prepositions of place.

items.example_assessed: "Eu vi-o ontem no mercado." — Pronome direto correto.
items.example_native: "Je l'ai vu hier au marche." — Correct direct pronoun.

items.example_assessed: Conjugas os verbos regulares (-ar, -er, -ir) corretamente na maioria dos tempos.
items.example_native: You conjugate regular verbs (-ar, -er, -ir) correctly in most tenses.

items.example_assessed: Entendes bem o portugues falado a velocidade normal.
items.example_native: You understand spoken Portuguese well at normal speed.

sections.content_assessed: O padrao central desta sessao e a confusao entre preterito perfeito e imperfeito. Usas o perfeito para descrever habitos e estados no passado, onde o imperfeito seria correto. Esta confusao e compreensivel dado que o frances tem uma distincao semelhante mas usa-a de forma diferente.
sections.content_native: The central pattern of this session is the confusion between the simple past and the imperfect. You use the simple past to describe habits and past states, where the imperfect would be correct. This confusion is understandable given that French has a similar distinction but uses it differently.

items.explanation_assessed: Usas o perfeito para descricoes e habitos: 'Ontem fez bom tempo' em vez de 'Ontem fazia bom tempo'.
items.explanation_native: You use the simple past for descriptions: 'Ontem fez bom tempo' instead of 'Ontem fazia bom tempo'.
items.evidence_assessed: "Quando fui crianca, joguei futebol." → Correto: "Quando era crianca, jogava futebol."
items.evidence_native: "Quando fui crianca, joguei futebol." → Correct: "Quando era crianca, jogava futebol."

items.explanation_assessed: Confundes 'em', 'a' e 'para' com direcao e localizacao.
items.explanation_native: You confuse 'em', 'a' and 'para' for direction and location.

items.explanation_assessed: Evitas o futuro do conjuntivo, que nao existe em frances: 'Quando voce vem' em vez de 'Quando voce vier'.
items.explanation_native: You avoid the future subjunctive, which does not exist in French: 'Quando voce vem' instead of 'Quando voce vier'.
items.evidence_assessed: "Se eu tenho tempo, vou." → Correto: "Se eu tiver tempo, vou."
items.evidence_native: "Se eu tenho tempo, vou." → Correct: "Se eu tiver tempo, vou."

items.explanation_assessed: Esqueces as contracoes obrigatorias: 'de o' em vez de 'do', 'em a' em vez de 'na'.
items.explanation_native: You forget the mandatory contractions: 'de o' instead of 'do', 'em a' instead of 'na'.
items.evidence_assessed: "O livro de o professor." → Correto: "O livro do professor."
items.evidence_native: "O livro de o professor." → Correct: "O livro do professor."

items.explanation_assessed: Colocas os pronomes em posicao francesa em vez de seguires as regras portuguesas.
items.explanation_native: You place pronouns in the French position instead of following Portuguese rules.

items.original_assessed: Errado: Quando fui crianca, joguei futebol.
items.original_native: Wrong: Quando fui crianca, joguei futebol.
items.corrected_assessed: Correto: Quando era crianca, jogava futebol.
items.corrected_native: Correct: Quando era crianca, jogava futebol.

items.original_assessed: Errado: Se eu tenho tempo, vou.
items.original_native: Wrong: Se eu tenho tempo, vou.
items.corrected_assessed: Correto: Se eu tiver tempo, vou.
items.corrected_native: Correct: Se eu tiver tempo, vou.
items.explanation_assessed: 'Se' + futuro do conjuntivo para condicoes futuras.

items.original_assessed: Errado: O livro de o professor.
items.original_native: Wrong: O livro de o professor.

items.original_assessed: Errado: Me disse que era tarde.
items.original_native: Wrong: Me disse que era tarde.
items.explanation_assessed: Em inicio de frase, pronome vai depois do verbo (enclise).
items.explanation_native: At the beginning of a sentence, the pronoun goes after the verb (enclisis).

items.action_assessed: Cada dia, escreve 3 frases no perfeito (acao unica) e 3 no imperfeito (descricao/habito).
items.action_native: Every day, write 3 sentences in the simple past (single action) and 3 in the imperfect (description/habit).

items.action_assessed: Regra: direcao = a, localizacao = em, finalidade = para. 3 frases por dia.
items.action_native: Rule: direction = a, location = em, purpose = para. 3 sentences per day.

items.action_assessed: Pratica: se + futuro conjuntivo, quando + futuro conjuntivo. 3 frases por dia.
items.action_native: Practice: se + future subjunctive, quando + future subjunctive. 3 sentences per day.

items.action_assessed: Memoriza: de+o=do, de+a=da, em+o=no, em+a=na, a+o=ao, a+a=a.
items.action_native: Memorize: de+o=do, de+a=da, em+o=no, em+a=na, a+o=ao, a+a=a.

items.action_assessed: Regra base: pronome depois do verbo, exceto com palavras negativas ou conjuncoes.
items.action_native: Basic rule: pronoun after the verb, except with negative words or conjunctions.

sections.explanation_assessed: Cada dia, forma 5 pares de frases: mesma situacao, uma vez no perfeito e uma vez no imperfeito. Pronuncia em voz alta.
sections.explanation_native: Every day, form 5 pairs of sentences: same situation, once in the simple past and once in the imperfect. Say them aloud.

patterns.de: Perfeito: Ontem comi uma pizza. (acao unica)
patterns.native: Simple past: Yesterday I ate a pizza. (single action)

patterns.de: Imperfeito: Quando era crianca, comia pizza todos os domingos. (habito)
patterns.native: Imperfect: When I was a child, I used to eat pizza every Sunday. (habit)

patterns.de: Combinado: Chovia (imperfeito) quando sai de casa (perfeito).
patterns.native: Combined: It was raining (imperfect) when I went out (simple past).

sections.daily_instruction_assessed: 5 pares por dia, em voz alta, sublinhando a escolha do tempo.
sections.daily_instruction_native: 5 pairs per day, aloud, emphasizing the tense choice.

sentences.de: Quando era jovem, morava no Porto.
sentences.native: When I was young, I lived in Porto.

sentences.de: Ontem fui ao mercado e comprei pao.
sentences.native: Yesterday I went to the market and bought some bread.

sentences.de: Fazia sol quando chegamos a praia.
sentences.native: The weather was nice when we arrived at the beach.

sentences.de: Se eu tiver tempo amanha, vou ao museu.
sentences.native: If I have time tomorrow, I will go to the museum.

sentences.de: O livro do professor esta na mesa.
sentences.native: The teacher's book is on the table.

sentences.de: Disse-me que estava cansado.
sentences.native: He told me he was tired.

sentences.de: Ontem fui ao cinema com os meus amigos.
sentences.native: Yesterday I went to the cinema with my friends.

sentences.de: Quando era crianca, brincava no jardim.
sentences.native: When I was a child, I used to play in the garden.

sentences.de: Chovia quando ela saiu de casa.
sentences.native: It was raining when she left the house.

sentences.de: Se eu tiver dinheiro, compro um carro novo.
sentences.native: If I have money, I will buy a new car.

sentences.de: O livro da Maria esta na mesa.
sentences.native: Marie's book is on the table.

sentences.de: Ela disse-me que ia viajar.
sentences.native: She told me she was going to travel.

items.wrong_assessed: Errado: Quando fui pequeno, joguei futebol.
items.wrong_native: Wrong: Quando fui pequeno, joguei futebol.
items.right_assessed: Correto: Quando era pequeno, jogava futebol.
items.right_native: Correct: Quando era pequeno, jogava futebol.

items.wrong_assessed: Errado: Se eu tenho tempo, vou.
items.wrong_native: Wrong: Se eu tenho tempo, vou.
items.right_assessed: Correto: Se eu tiver tempo, vou.
items.right_native: Correct: Se eu tiver tempo, vou.

items.wrong_assessed: Errado: O livro de a professora.
items.wrong_native: Wrong: O livro de a professora.

items.wrong_assessed: Errado: Me disse que era tarde.
items.wrong_native: Wrong: Me disse que era tarde.

sections.title_assessed: Trabalho de casa C — Fluencia oral

sentences.de: De manha acordei cedo e tomei o pequeno-almoco.
sentences.native: In the morning I got up early and had breakfast.

sentences.de: Depois sai porque fazia bom tempo.
sentences.native: Then I went out because the weather was nice.

sentences.de: Caminhei no parque durante uma hora.
sentences.native: I walked in the park for an hour.

sentences.de: Quando estava no parque, encontrei um velho amigo.
sentences.native: When I was in the park, I ran into an old friend.

sentences.de: Tomamos cafe juntos num pequeno cafe.
sentences.native: We had a coffee together in a small bistro.

sentences.de: Contou-me que trabalhava agora em Franca.
sentences.native: He told me he was now working in France.

sentences.de: Depois do nosso encontro, voltei para casa.
sentences.native: After our meeting, I went back home.

sentences.de: A noite, cozinhei para a minha familia.
sentences.native: In the evening, I cooked for my family.

weeks.goal_native: Automatic choice of the correct tense

weeks.goal_assessed: Conjuntivo futuro correto + pronomes no lugar certo

weeks.daily_assessed: Monologo de 2 minutos com foco consciente

sections.goal_assessed: Estabilizar a escolha dos tempos sob pressao
sections.step1_assessed: Cada dia 5 pares de frases em voz alta — conscientemente devagar, tempo sublinhado.
sections.step1_native: Every day 5 pairs of sentences aloud — consciously slow, tense emphasized.
sections.step2_assessed: Um monologo de 2 minutos sobre o teu dia de ontem. Alternar perfeito e imperfeito. Gravar. Ouvir. Repetir.
sections.step2_native: A 2-minute monologue about your day yesterday. Alternate simple past and imperfect. Record. Listen. Repeat.

cefr_footer.passive_assessed: Competencia passiva (teto estimado de compreensao): B1.2
cefr_footer.summary_assessed: Estas na faixa B1. A tua base e solida mas os tempos e as preposicoes permanecem instaveis. Com treino focado, B2 e realista em 4-5 meses.
cefr_footer.summary_native: You are in the B1 range. Your foundation is solid but tenses and prepositions remain unstable. With targeted training, B2 is realistic in 4-5 months.
cefr_footer.self_correction_assessed: Capacidade de autocorrecao: baixa a media

block_d.cefr_summary_native: Your active spoken Portuguese is at level B1.1. This means you can communicate in everyday situations, but tenses and prepositions break down under pressure. Your passive comprehension is higher at B1.2.
top_problems_native: Simple past used instead of imperfect for descriptions and habits
Future subjunctive avoided (does not exist in French)
block_d.key_recommendation_native: Practice the Tense Engine every day: form 5 pairs of sentences — same situation, once in the simple past and once in the imperfect. This single exercise will correct your biggest weakness.
block_d.next_steps_native: Focus on simple past vs. imperfect for the next 2 weeks, then move on to prepositions and the future subjunctive. Schedule a reassessment in 3 months.
